_description: MCP server reference for Darkroom projects. 'installed' servers are configured by setup.sh. 'optional' servers can be added manually to ~/.claude.json.
_installed: These servers are installed automatically by setup.sh into settings.json and ~/.claude.json.

context7._description: Library documentation lookup. Auto-triggered by /docs skill and documentation-related prompts.
context7._usage: Triggered by: 'how to use X', 'X docs', 'api reference for Y'

Sanity._description: Sanity CMS operations. Requires OAuth auth on first use. See: sanity.io/docs/compute-and-ai/mcp-server
Sanity._usage: Sanity projects, GROQ queries, CMS-driven content workflows

tldr._description: Semantic codebase analysis and repository-level search. Requires: pipx install llm-tldr
tldr._usage: Find implementations, understand large codebases, semantic search across files

_optional: These servers are NOT installed by default. Add them manually to ~/.claude.json if needed.

github._description: GitHub integration for issues, PRs, projects, and repos.
github._usage: Project management, issue tracking, PR creation, code review
github._note: Alternative: use 'gh' CLI directly via Bash (no MCP server needed, lower context cost).

vercel._description: Vercel deployment management. View deployments, logs, environment variables.
vercel._usage: Deploy, check build status, view logs, manage env vars

memory._description: Persistent memory across sessions. Stores facts, preferences, and context.
memory._usage: Remember project decisions, user preferences, learned patterns
